reviews.review_description:
I have had this app for about a month…I like to use something for a while before giving it a review. 

Simple to use and a nice way to play while trying to relax. I like the variety of sheep that appear and that you can catch them, although, it would be nice if you could easily switch the sheep between hands or hold one in each hand. 

There are a lot of sheep to collect, and you get a good variety at the start…I don’t know how long or how many times you have to play before collecting them all, but my book is no where close to complete, so I have a lot of sheep to look forward to getting as I continue to play. 

Sometimes, it’s hard to catch the specific sheep you are trying to get, and because it only uses hand tracking, I have to keep the lights on. I would love it if this app would allow you to use controllers so that it would work with my infrared lights. Then, I could play with sheep and just take the headset off when I’m done and not have to worry about the room lights. 

Overall, super cute app and worth the download. Giving it a 4.5 but rounding up for this review to a five.

🐏Sheep character 'Baba' is so cute! You can enjoy games in a comfortable atmosphere, and it's fun and I'm constantly curious because it features characters wearing various costumes 🧐! It's nice to be able to lie on a fluffy bed and play with your hands easily!! I hope there are more new costumes coming out ❤️🔥 And I hope this cute character is made into a giant soft and fluffy body pillow!!!💫

Baa baa dream is a nice little Calming experience. Did you ever wanted to count sheeps im VR? Here is your chance. Handtracking works nice and the graphics are really well done and in a cute style.  You can Call the sheeps via a Bell. My daughter was amazed by the little game 🙂 Worth to check it out
Game comes exactly as advertised. Just very calming to watch all the different types of sheep pop up. Curious to see what sheep will arrive next. Looking forward to any future updates.
Simple but nicely developed app. It needs room lighting for hand tracking so not able to substitute for counting imaginary sheep to help sleeping!

This game has such a cozy vibe. The graphics are adorable, and just following the sheep around really helps me unwind.
It’s the perfect little game to play before bed. Super chill and calming. 🐑💤

reviews.review_title: The atmosphere of dreaming is impressive
reviews.review_description: This is the first time I've ever experienced a vr game. I'm grateful for the new peaceful vr game.
I love how those sheep have different faces and costumes!
